_publications._publicationTitle: Identifying Symptoms of Distress in Youth Living with Neurofibromatosis Type 1 (NF1).

_contextSnippet: Our findings suggest that the DT and problem checklist may be a useful screening tool for clinicians to implement within the NF1 setting...Understanding a patient's level of distress prior to providing genetic counseling can better allow for the counselor to target specific information or intervention needs.
details: May be a useful screening tool for clinicians to implement within the NF1 setting, allowing genetic counselors to target specific information or intervention needs based on patient distress levels
